chapter_title.ar: بَابُ دَعَوَاتٍ مُوجَزَاتٍ لِجَمِيعِ الْحَوَائِجِ لِلدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – Brief supplications for the entirety of the needs of the world and the Hereafter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/451)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/451)
text: رَأَيْتُ عَلِيَّ بْنَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي فِنَاءِ الْكَعْبَةِ فِي اللَّيْلِ وَ هُوَ يُصَلِّي فَأَطَالَ الْقِيَامَ حَتَّى جَعَلَ مَرَّةً يَتَوَكَّأُ عَلَى رِجْلِهِ الْيُمْنَى وَ مَرَّةً عَلَى رِجْلِهِ الْيُسْرَى ثُمَّ سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ بِصَوْتٍ كَأَنَّهُ بَاكٍ
يَا سَيِّدِي تُعَذِّبُنِي وَ حُبُّكَ فِي قَلْبِي أَمَا وَ عِزَّتِكَ لَئِنْ فَعَلْتَ لَتَجْمَعَنَّ بَيْنِي وَ بَيْنَ قَوْمٍ طَالَ مَا عَادَيْتُهُمْ فِيكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muhammad Bin Abu Hamza, from his father who said,

‘I saw Aliasws Bin Al-Husaynasws in the courtyard of the Kabah during the night and heasws was praying Salāt, and heasws prolonged the standing until he repeatedly leaned upon hisasws right leg, and at times upon hisasws left leg. Then I heard himasws saying in a voice as if heasws was crying. (The suppliction is):

‘O my Master! Will You<sup>azwj</sup> Punish me while Your<sup>azwj</sup> Love is in my<sup>asws</sup> heart? But, by Your<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty, if You<sup>azwj</sup> Do so, You<sup>azwj</sup> would be Gathering between me<sup>asws</sup> and the group of people with whom I<sup>asws</sup> have prolonged being their enemy for Your<sup>azwj</sup> Sake’’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Muhammad ibn abu Hamza from his father who has said the following: “Once I saw Ali ibn al-Husayn (a.s.) praying in the vicinity of al-Ka’bah in the night. He prolonged in standing so much so that he would lean on his right leg once and then on the left leg. Then I heard him saying with a crying voice, ‘O my Master, will You punish me while there is Your love in my heart? If You will do so You will be placing me together with the people with whom, just for Your sake, I had been enemies all along.’”
